title: AI Agents: Why Building Them Is Way Harder Than You Think! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that developing AI agents is significantly more difficult than traditional software engineering. The iterative, data-driven nature of AI requires a fundamentally different mindset and skillset from conventional development.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that building AI agents is harder than conventional software engineering. The core claim: agent development is iterative and data-driven, which demands a different mindset and skillset than traditional development. The takeaway is that the engineering practices used for standard software do not transfer cleanly to AI agents.
